title: The Moonhunter
original_title: 14 ตุลา สงครามประชาชน
overview: 14th October 1973 event, the power of freedom was happened by a group of country. From Thammasat University through the line of soul to meet the death under the sheet of tricolor flag in the amidst of gun’s soot and friend’s cry.
